feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Read a JMS queue with a timer event
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I would like to know, if is it possible to read data from a JMS queue with a timer?
I want to run my JMS queue receiver flow daily, but I cannot connect the sender to a timer event. I want the data to be stored in JMS queue until the timer run the receiver flow.

This is what my receiver flow looks like right now...

Regards.

entry.title: 401 authorization error while calling the CPI service from POSTMAN and SOAP UI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Up until this past weekend, everything was going well with my SAP Cloud connection login and admin access. However, for the past two days, I've been receiving 401 authorization errors when attempting to contact the CPI services using POSTMAN and SOAP UI.

Kindly help me to understand what am i missing here (password rest also done but still same issue).

Regards,

entry.title: how to read the name of groovy script sap cloud integration cpi
entry.content:
hi, I need to use the name of the groovy script inside the script to use it as the attachment name

For example the script name is Log Payload, I want the attachment to be called Log Payload

How can I do?

I've done some testing but am having problems, i tried this:

bur i have this error:

Thank you

entry.title: CPI Mapping condition issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to implement a mapping condition in CPI but unable to populate the data in target as per the requirement..

Scenario 1

If <S_LT> and <S_TM> contains same number of segments in a context then copy <D_373>  to target field.

Which is working fine.

 

Scenario 2

If <S_TM> comes only once in a context and <S_LT> comes more than once, then copy <D_373> to target as many as the occurrences of <S_LT>

entry.title: HTTP Receiver adapter with Dynamic value in URL using header/property value in CPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

Need some input in configuration of Receiver HTTP Adapter with dynamic values ( from Header/Property) in URL . 

Please guide how to do configuration in adapter .

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Jeevitha

entry.title: Splitting commaseperated value and passing it to different target fields through Groovy script
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a requirement to split the input field and passing it to different fields. Pls guide me in groovy script to get this output.

Ex:

Inputfield = a,b,c,d

In Output 

text1=a

text2=b

text3=c

text4=d 

Thanks & Regards,

Jeevitha

entry.title: RFC to receive PDF files
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm working on a scenario which is related to SFTP to RFC. Where I need to pass pdf files from a SFTP server to RFC. Please let me know which type to RFC destination(Example:- ABAP, HTTP Connection to External Server, Internal Connection, TCP/IP Connection) and function module I've to create so that it can receive pdf files.

Thanks and Regards,
Sufiyan.

entry.title: Read an asynchronous messaging with a Timer Event
entry.content:
Hi,
I want a Timer Event which will run daily to read the JMS Queue messages or some asynchronous messaging adapter and forward it for processing.
Request-Reply is not working for JMS Adapter.
How to achieve this?

entry.title: [deleted]
entry.content: [deleted]

entry.title: ABAP Proxy to SFTP Retry
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a scenario where we CPI receives ABAP proxy call which will be forwarded to a SFTP receiver. Sometimes, we get error in SFTP like server unavailable, timeout etc. In such cases the message is going in failed status in CPI without any retry. What is the best approach for handling retries and also errors?

entry.title: Need help in mapping part in CPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

I need  help in mapping

 

There are 3 E1EDL24 segment in IDoc , So 3 segment will be created in target structure.

There are many E1EDL37 segments (It is not coming under E1EDL34, this is separate segment), which will have Quantity field under the segment E1EDL44 , here I need to add all the quantity corresponding to the material number and pass the value,

Please let me know how to achieve this.

 

I need highlighted value in the target field.

 

Thanks in advance,

Regards,

Jeevitha N

entry.title: Shortening Source File name in SAP PO !
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a passthrough scenario in SAP PO 7.5 and files are picked up from SFTP folder and placing into a File server keeping the same file name from the Source SFTP.

Now we need to truncate the file name . 

If the file name at Source is ABC_12345_LKN.8URTY.txt  then we need to write the file at the target File server with the name as ABC_12345.txt 

I have created dummy DT, MT and SI, mapping, operation mapping and using the following UDF but getting error in sender channel. Please suggest here

Error:

 

 

Please suggest how can this be achieved .

 

Regards,

Arvik

entry.title: Connectivity guaranteed with Cloud Integration version and Cloud Connector version
entry.content: Is there any reference where I can check connectivity guaranteed between BTP Cloud Integration version and Cloud Connector version?

entry.title: SAP CPI JDBC Adapter
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there any way to see the what query is going to the database from CPI JDBC adapter?

entry.title: Retrieving iFlow Name or ID at Runtime in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content: I'm trying to retrieve the name or ID of an iFlow during runtime in SAP Cloud Integration. I've checked the properties and sysenv, but couldn't find any relevant values. Does anyone have any suggestions on how to achieve this?

entry.title: Cloud Integration Adapter does not read exchange property value
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using RabbitMQ receiver adapter from SAP in Cloud Integration. I use exchange property for the parameter in the adapter because I have to send to the receiver dynamically. 

But then I get the following error:

So, it seems that the adapter taking the parameter "${property.rcvCredential}" literally and try to look for a credential with that alias instead of taking the value of exchange property rcvCredential. Using exchange property in an adapter works for some other adapters. 

Does that mean this adapter does not support exchange property? Is there a work around to assign a dynamic parameter in the adapter?

 

Thank you

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh - Message processing status "Retry" for failed messages
entry.content:
Hello

I have a query on the "Retry" message processing status in Cloud Integration.

When messages polled from Event Mesh using AMQP adapter fails due to some reason during the iflow processing in Cloud Integration, the messages end up in "Retry" status in the "Monitor Message Processing" view.  After the message is retried based on the configuration mentioned in Event Mesh Queue/AMQP adapter, the message should apparently go into "Failed" status but it remains in "Retry" status.

Is there an adjustment in configuration that can be done either at Event Mesh Queue or AMQP adapter, so that message processing status is displayed as "Failed" instead of "Retry" (screenshot below) ?

entry.title: Error in SOAP Sender adapter SAP CPI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a SOAP to SOAP scenario in SAP CPI. The target web service expects the request with SOAP envelope along with wsse:Security headers. This is built in the source system and sent to CPI as it is. The request coming to CPI looks something like this:

But it is currently failing at the SOAP sender adapter with the following error:

Could someone please explain what needs to be done? Currently I am not able to understand why the request is not even going into the iFlow. It simplay always fails at the sender SOAP adapter. It works when I remove the security headers from the SOAP envelope. I have set the "Service Definition" as Manual in the SOAP sender. Any help would be appreciated. Thanks!

Regards,

Faisal

entry.title: Groovy Script Parse Error
entry.content:
Can you help me with a SAP CPI groovy script ?
Objective : I want to merge the content of an exchange property with XML content and the incoming payload by referencing a key <userId> in my case.

the sample format of the xml in the exchange property is this

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<rootA>
	<cust_A_WFM>
		<cust_ADPWFMStatus>I</cust_ADPWFMStatus>
		<externalCodeNav>
			<User>
				<userId>123456</userId>
			</User>
		</externalCodeNav>
		<lastModifiedDateTime>*</lastModifiedDateTime>
		<externalCode>*</externalCode>
		<effectiveStartDate>*</effectiveStartDate>
	</cust_ADP_WFM>
	<cust_ADP_WFM>
		<cust_ADPWFMStatus>I</cust_ADPWFMStatus>
		<externalCodeNav>
			<User>
				<userId>987654</userId>
			</User>
		</externalCodeNav>
		<lastModifiedDateTime>*</lastModifiedDateTime>
		<externalCode>*</externalCode>
		<effectiveStartDate>2*</effectiveStartDate>
	</cust_A_WFM>
</rootA>

While the incoming payload, is this 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<rootEmpJob>
	<EmpJob>
		<employeeTypeNav>
			<PicklistOption>
				<picklistLabels>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>WC</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>White Collar</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
				</picklistLabels>
				<externalCode>W</externalCode>
			</PicklistOption>
		</employeeTypeNav>
		<userNav/>
		<employmentTypeNav>
			<PicklistOption>
				<picklistLabels>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>A</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>A</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
				</picklistLabels>
				<externalCode>*</externalCode>
			</PicklistOption>
		</employmentTypeNav>
		<lastModifiedDateTime>2024-04-17T10:19:37.000</lastModifiedDateTime>
		<locationNav>
			<FOLocation>
				<externalCode>*</externalCode>
				<addressNavDEFLT>
					<FOCorporateAddressDEFLT>
						<country>DNK</country>
						<countryNav>
							<Territory>
								<territoryCode>DNK</territoryCode>
							</Territory>
						</countryNav>
					</FOCorporateAddressDEFLT>
				</addressNavDEFLT>
			</FOLocation>
		</locationNav>
		<costCenter>1</costCenter>
		<customString5Nav/>
		<customString5/>
		<jobCode>1</jobCode>
		<employmentNav>
			<EmpEmployment>
				<customDate21>2020-11-16T00:00:00.000</customDate21>
				<customDate1/>
				<customDate2/>
				<customDate3/>
				<seniorityDate>2020-11-16T00:00:00.000</seniorityDate>
			</EmpEmployment>
		</employmentNav>
		<customString24>*</customString24>
		<userId>*</userId>
		<eventReason>A</eventReason>
		<customDouble1>1</customDouble1>
		<fte>1.0</fte>
		<employeeClassNav>
			<PicklistOption>
				<picklistLabels>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>*</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>*</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
				</picklistLabels>
				<externalCode>1</externalCode>
			</PicklistOption>
		</employeeClassNav>
		<company>1</company>
		<location>2</location>
		<department>3</department>
	</EmpJob>
	<EmpJob>
		<employeeTypeNav>
			<PicklistOption>
				<picklistLabels>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>WC</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>C</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
				</picklistLabels>
				<externalCode>W</externalCode>
			</PicklistOption>
		</employeeTypeNav>
		<userNav>
			<User>
				<firstName>m</firstName>
				<lastName>d</lastName>
				<manager>
					<User>
						<userId>*</userId>
						<RehireNewSAPID/>
					</User>
				</manager>
				<externalCodeOfcust_ADP_WFMNav>
					<cust_ADP_WFM>
						<cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
							<cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
								<cust_FactoryID>*</cust_FactoryID>
								<cust_Payrule>*</cust_Payrule>
								<cust_persontypeNav>
									<PickListValueV2>
										<label_defaultValue>label</label_defaultValue>
									</PickListValueV2>
								</cust_persontypeNav>
								<cust_accrualprofile>*</cust_accrualprofile>
								<cust_persontype>*</cust_persontype>
								<cust_Countrycode>PL</cust_Countrycode>
							</cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
						</cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
					</cust_ADP_WFM>
					<cust_ADP_WFM>
						<cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
							<cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
								<cust_FactoryID></cust_FactoryID>
								<cust_Payrule></cust_Payrule>
								<cust_persontypeNav>
									<PickListValueV2>
										<label_defaultValue></label_defaultValue>
									</PickListValueV2>
								</cust_persontypeNav>
								<cust_accrualprofile></cust_accrualprofile>
								<cust_persontype></cust_persontype>
								<cust_Countrycode></cust_Countrycode>
							</cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
						</cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
					</cust_ADP_WFM>
				</externalCodeOfcust_ADP_WFMNav>
				<dateOfBirth>1980-01-01T00:00:00.000</dateOfBirth>
				<mi/>
				<email>dummy</email>
				<RehireNewSAPID>*</RehireNewSAPID>
				<status>t</status>
				<username>MIDOZ</username>
			</User>
		</userNav>
		<employmentTypeNav>
			<PicklistOption>
				<picklistLabels>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label></label>
					</PicklistLabel>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label></label>
					</PicklistLabel>
				</picklistLabels>
				<externalCode></externalCode>
			</PicklistOption>
		</employmentTypeNav>
		<lastModifiedDateTime>2024-04-16T10:24:39.000</lastModifiedDateTime>
		<locationNav>
			<FOLocation>
				<externalCode></externalCode>
				<addressNavDEFLT>
					<FOCorporateAddressDEFLT>
						<country>POL</country>
						<countryNav>
							<Territory>
								<territoryCode>POL</territoryCode>
							</Territory>
						</countryNav>
					</FOCorporateAddressDEFLT>
				</addressNavDEFLT>
			</FOLocation>
		</locationNav>
		<costCenter>*</costCenter>
		<customString5Nav/>
		<customString5/>
		<jobCode>*</jobCode>
		<employmentNav>
			<EmpEmployment>
				<customDate21>2011-08-01T00:00:00.000</customDate21>
				<customDate1/>
				<customDate2/>
				<customDate3/>
				<seniorityDate>2024-04-16T00:00:00.000</seniorityDate>
			</EmpEmployment>
		</employmentNav>
		<customString24/>
		<userId>1</userId>
		<eventReason></eventReason>
		<customDouble1>1</customDouble1>
		<fte>1.0</fte>
		<employeeClassNav>
			<PicklistOption>
				<picklistLabels>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>Standard Employment(PL)</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>Standard Employment(PL)</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
				</picklistLabels>
				<externalCode>1</externalCode>
			</PicklistOption>
		</employeeClassNav>
		<company>1</company>
		<location>1</location>
		<department>1</department>
	</EmpJob>
</rootEmpJob>

I am using this script

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil
import groovy.xml.XmlParser

Message processData(Message message) {
    // Get the incoming payload
    def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String) as String

    // Get the exchange property containing cust_A_WFM
    def custADPWFMPayload = message.getProperty('backup_call1') as String

    // Remove the XML declaration if present
    body = body.replaceFirst(/\<\?xml.*?\?\>/, "").trim()
    custAWFMPayload = custAWFMPayload.replaceFirst(/\<\?xml.*?\?\>/, "").trim()

    // Parse both XMLs
    def parser = new XmlParser(false, false) // Disable namespace aware parsing
    def rootEmpJob = parser.parseText(body)
    def rootADP = parser.parseText(custAWFMPayload)

    // Convert the rootADP to a map for easy lookup
    def adpMap = rootADP.cust_A_WFM.collectEntries { adp ->
        [adp.externalCodeNav.User.userId.text(), adp]
    }

    // Iterate over each EmpJob element and merge, or remove if no match
    def empJobsToRemove = []
    rootEmpJob.EmpJob.each { empJob ->
        def userId = empJob.userId.text()
        def correspondingA = aMap[userId]
        if (correspondingA) {
            // Create a new node for externalCodeOfcust_A_WFMNav if it doesn't exist
            def userNav = empJob.userNav[0]
            if (userNav) {
                def externalCodeOfcust_A_WFMNav = userNav.externalCodeOfcust_A_WFMNav ?: userNav.appendNode('externalCodeOfcust_A_WFMNav')
                // Append the corresponding ADP data
                externalCodeOfcust_A_WFMNav.append(correspondingA)
            }
        } else {
            // Add to the list of nodes to remove
            empJobsToRemove << empJob
        }
    }

    // Remove the unmatched EmpJob nodes
    empJobsToRemove.each { empJob ->
        rootEmpJob.remove(empJob)
    }

    // Convert the merged XML back to string and set it as the message body
    def mergedXml = XmlUtil.serialize(rootEmpJob)
    message.setBody(mergedXml)

    return message
}

But i get this error 

javax.script.ScriptException: org.codehaus.groovy.control.MultipleCompilationErrorsException: startup failed:
ADP_mergeXML_custADP_empData__Script.groovy: 3: unable to resolve class groovy.xml.XmlParser
@ line 3, column 1.
import groovy.xml.XmlParser
^

1 error
, cause: org.codehaus.groovy.control.MultipleCompilationErrorsException: startup failed:
ADP_mergeXML_custADP_empData__Script.groovy: 3: unable to resolve class groovy.xml.XmlParser
@ line 3, column 1.
import groovy.xml.XmlParser
^

1 error

entry.title: JMS Dead Letter Queue Alert
entry.content:
Dear All,

What is the best way to alert admin when a DLQ queue is filled with some entries? Is there anyway we can move the entries to processing queue without manual intervention?
